testcases.input: customers = "YYNY" Output: 2 Explanation: - Closing the shop at the 0th hour incurs in 1+1+0+1 = 3 penalty. - Closing the shop at the 1st hour incurs in 0+1+0+1 = 2 penalty. - Closing the shop at the 2nd hour incurs in 0+0+0+1 = 1 penalty. - Closing the shop at the 3rd hour incurs in 0+0+1+1 = 2 penalty. - Closing the shop at the 4th hour incurs in 0+0+1+0 = 1 penalty. Closing the shop at 2nd or 4th hour gives a minimum penalty. Since 2 is earlier, the optimal closing time is 2.
